Winged Hussars

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3303-09-29 · 2 mentions
Active: 3303-09-29 → 3303-10-06
Related Entities
L
HIP 110028
L
Zander Dock
Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3303-10-06
Galactic News Winged Hussars Appeal Comes to an End
The Winged Hussars' appeal for rare liquors concluded successfully, resulting in a massive influx of deliveries to Zander Dock. The organisation thanked pilots for bringing new business opportunities to the border colonies.
3303-09-29
Community Goal Winged Hussars Appeal
The Winged Hussars announce plans to establish a recreational installation and tourist beacon in the HIP 110028 system near an Earth-like world. The organisation has requested various rare liquors for delivery to Zander Dock to cater to wealthy tourists from core systems.
